base_context.description: The next run will be this leader/base config plus ONLY the JSON changes returned by the advisor.

expected_direction: improve selected objective by changing entry quality/profile selection without starving trades
expected_effect: Should improve risk-adjusted quality by keeping the high-PnL charm-wall convex sleeve while reducing unsupported or overextended wall-breakaway heat. Main tradeoff is small-sample starvation: reject if charm_wall_breakaway_long PnL/hour falls below about 225, total net profit drops below 98% of run_044, or completed trades fall more than 10% without a material MAE/drawdown gain.
label: charm-wall-supported-extension-box
rationale: Use exactly one legal family: batch_d_charm_wall_breakaway_long. The leader base is strong, and broad entry filters have recently damaged profit and MAE. The best next test is a profile-local charm-wall admission-quality probe that preserves convex exits, avoids the duplicate 25-point charm-wall expansion keyset, and does not disturb VALID_0DTE pullback, charm-pin, or 1DTE fallback edges.
